item.title: How Far is Too Far?
item.description: The Premise For some people in the US, round-trip travel time to the nearest abortion-providing clinic can be about nine hours. We set out to quantify access to abortion clinics by measuring what really affects people: how long it takes to drive there. My Contributions Data Collection Some Data Analysis Some Graphical Mockups Animation Story Writing Collaborators This project was done in collaboration with many of the fine folks at The Pudding.
